subject: Add implementation roadmap for inter-company transaction tool
body:
Creates comprehensive phased plan to integrate Financial Models
framework with existing Pricing Equilibrium Calculator:

- Phase 0: Preparation & planning
- Phase 1: Foundation infrastructure (perspectives, tax inputs)
- Phases 2-7: Individual model implementations (Models 1-6)
- Phase 8: Structure Selector module
- Phase 9: Compliance Analyzer module
- Phases 10-12: Advanced visualizations and Stage 2/3 features
- Phase 13: Polish & documentation

Each phase broken into sub-phases for separate session work.
Includes dependency graph, priority order, and technical notes.
title: Add implementation roadmap for inter-company transaction tool
